the-betrayed-wifes-revenge-marrying-the-.author: Unknown Author
the-betrayed-wifes-revenge-marrying-the-.description: "Can you and Daddy get divorced?" Those six words from my seven-year-old son shattered my world, and I never imagined he and my husband would choose another woman over me, leaving me broken and alone. The pain of my son's manipulated rejection led to a devastating accident, and just when I thought things couldn't get worse, I found myself caught in a twisted kidnapping scheme orchestrated by my husband's mistress. But life has a way of surprising you. Meeting Howard Thompson changed everything - this controlled yet caring CEO raising his traumatized niece showed me what real love could be. In my quest to find his niece's voice, could our yearning hearts finally find their way to each other?

citys-spotlight-the-hidden-wife-of-ceo.description: I married into a top-tier wealthy family in place of my sister, to a man who was on the brink of death. His unexpected recovery left everyone disappointed. When he learned that I had successfully conceived through artificial insemination, he calmly and cruelly said, "Which do you prefer, surgical abortion or medical abortion?" Four years later, our twins returned to Aurora Bay and scorned their father, "What's the use of being handsome? A useless coward like you doesn't deserve our mommy!" Desperate to win us back, he began to plead frantically, "Babies, I'm sorry. It was all my fault!"

the-ex-wife-strikes-first.description: On my birthday, my husband gifted his dying ex-lover my mother’s necklace—while our son called her 'Mom'. I served divorce papers that night. Now, as my violin career ignites, the billionaire who discarded me begs for a second chance. But revenge plays the sweetest melody... and his regret is only the first note.

With that ,he pulled down my underwear, exposing my trembling breasts. When I felt him bite them, I squirmed it stung, but I felt his tongue glide over his bite mark soothing the pain. But he just pressed his hardness against my thighs, rubbing slowly, but not entering. I squirmed, look at him with a mix of shyness and frustration. "Why are you looking at me like that?" My cheeks flush instantly. "What do you want? Just say it." he commanded, looking into my eyes as I moaned. "I want you."I moaned breathlessly, feeling him go deeper and increase his rhythm. Oh, my God... so good. I, Stella Winston, seemed to have it all—beauty, a loving family, and a wealthy fiancé. But my perfect world shattered when my fiancé, Brian, and my sister, Lucy, betrayed me. I was compelled to become the substitute bride, marrying Adam Lancaster, a disabled man in exchange for care for my grandmother. Just when I thought all hope was lost, I discovered Adam was not at all like the rumors suggested.

the-queens-rebirth.title: The Queen's Rebirth
the-queens-rebirth.author: Unknown Author
the-queens-rebirth.description: Reborn amid viral infamy, Lucy White dismantles her "talentless heiress" narrative with guzheng virtuosity, wilderness grit, and chef-level precision. As mockery turns to awe, A-lister Ethan Smith hijacks headlines by posting a video of himself pleading to publicly date her—upending his "Ice King" persona. Beyond the spotlight, Lucy’s hand-drawn talismans stun mystics, her films dominate awards, and her tech empire reshapes industries. When asked about retiring to inherit her family fortune, she declares, “I’ll keep acting,” while Ethan—now her doting CEO husband—vows to bankroll her stardom indefinitely. The internet’s verdict? Lucy isn’t just rewriting her story; she’s scripting a legacy where genius and love defy every limit.

marriage-by-contract-with-a-billionaire.title: Marriage By Contract with a Billionaire
marriage-by-contract-with-a-billionaire.author: Unknown Author
marriage-by-contract-with-a-billionaire.description: I never imagined I’d end up as Mrs. Alexander Kane. The cold, enigmatic billionaire barely notices anyone—let alone me. But when his grandfather's will demands that he marry and have a child within 18 months, I become his unexpected choice after he dismisses dozens of other women. Why me? I don’t know. But I’m determined to make him see me as more than just a convenient solution. Life in his world is nothing like I imagined. Beneath his frosty exterior lies a man haunted by secrets—and the closer I get, the more dangerous it feels. What started as a simple arrangement is quickly becoming something far more complicated. Now, I’m risking everything—including my heart. Can I melt the heart of a man who’s never believed in love, or will I be the one left shattered and alone?
marriage-by-contract-with-a-billionaire.short_description: I never imagined I’d end up as Mrs. Alexander Kane. The cold, enigmatic billionaire barely notices anyone—let alone me. But when his grandfather's will demands that he marry and have a child within...

my-phone-traveled-with-me-to-the-80s.title: My Phone Traveled with Me to the-80s
my-phone-traveled-with-me-to-the-80s.author: Unknown Author
my-phone-traveled-with-me-to-the-80s.description: After a freak accident, Emily Johnson transmigrates into a spoiled novel antagonist fated to abandon her military husband and twin sons, only to die destitute. Defying the plot, she uses a mysterious shopping app to nourish her malnourished stepchildren, transforming them into thriving toddlers. When stoic officer Michael Stone returns, expecting divorce papers, he’s met with domestic warmth—chubby boys clinging to his legs and a wife rewriting her villainous role. Refusing her exit, Michael’s icy demeanor thaws, derailing the original storyline. Now trapped in a rewritten narrative, Emily scrambles to escape the male lead’s sudden obsession, while the twins wage tearful warfare to keep their “mommy” from vanishing.

the-priceless-diva-who-left-his-world-in.description: Her ex-husband declared, "The person I admired most was that legendary racer.' She smiled thinly. "Hate to break it to you-that was me." He said, "Jealous I blew a fortune on a world-famous jeweler for Violet?" She let out a cool laugh. "Funny, that designer trained under me." He scoffed, "Buying a dying firm won't put you in my league. Snap out of it." She shrugged. "Weird-I just steered your company off a cliff." Stunned, he blurted out, "Baby, come back. I'll love you forever." She wrinkled her nose. "Hard pass. Keep your cheap love." Then she took a mogul's arm and never looked back.

the-fallen-heiress-gambit.title: The Fallen Heiress' Gambit
the-fallen-heiress-gambit.author: Unknown Author
the-fallen-heiress-gambit.description: Evelyn Sinclair thought marrying into the Blackwood dynasty would secure her future. Instead, she awakens to a nightmare—her "husband" Nathan is secretly funding her rival, her best friend is a spy, and her own identity is a lie. Trapped in a gilded cage, Evelyn discovers her late parents’ murder was no accident. The Blackwoods stole her inheritance, replaced her with a changeling twin, and used her as pawn in a decades-old power play. Now, with a hidden camera exposing their darkest secrets, she must navigate a deadly web of corporate espionage, arranged marriages, and a long-lost sibling determined to destroy her. Armed with nothing but a sharp wit and a thirst for vengeance, Evelyn wages war on the family that shattered her life. But when Nathan’s "first love" returns with proof of a secret child, Evelyn realizes the biggest betrayal might be the one she’s been living…

to-avenge-my-ex-i-married-a-tycoon.author: Unknown Author
to-avenge-my-ex-i-married-a-tycoon.description: The very day she came back into her home country, she heard the most absurd news. "Your sister is getting married with Mr. Stephenson". "What did you say?" She couldn't believe it. At the engagement party, she was shocked to see her sister getting engaged to her fiancé. "Daniel, remember this, I dumped you! Did you hear that? I dumped you, not the other way round." ..... Who could have guessed that after being betrayed by her fiancé and sister and being labelled as a home wrecker, someone would still want to marry her? "Don't you want to get revenge on your fiancé for what he did?" Nathan Clemon asked Hilda. "What has that got to do with you?" She snapped back. "It has got everything to do with me. I am the only person who could help you achieve that whiles giving you the happiness that any woman would wish in this world."

rebirth-top-star-actress.title: Rebirth Top Star Actress
rebirth-top-star-actress.author: Unknown Author
rebirth-top-star-actress.description: I was an orphan, and when I turned twelve, my parents found me. I thought I could finally escape my suffering and experience the warmth of a home and the love of parents. To fit in, I did everything I could to please and serve my family. But what I never expected was that the reason they sought me out was for my bone marrow... They wanted to use it to save someone else! My heart shattered. How could parents be so cruel? Disillusioned with the world, I fell from the balcony and died. But to my surprise, I was reborn! This time, I would live for myself! Those who had hurt me would pay the price!

heartbreak-billionairehe-should-never-ha.title: Heartbreak Billionaire：He should never have Let Go
heartbreak-billionairehe-should-never-ha.author: Unknown Author
heartbreak-billionairehe-should-never-ha.description: Sunlit hours found their affection glimmering while moonlit nights ignited reckless desire. But when Brandon learned his beloved might last only half a year, he coolly handed Millie divorce papers, murmuring, "This is all for appearances; we'll get married again once she's calmed down.' Millie, spine straight and cheeks dry, felt her pulse go hollow. The sham split grew permanent; she quietly ended their unborn child and stepped into a new beginning. Brandon unraveled, his car tearing down the street, unwilling to let go of the woman he'd discarded, pleading for her to look back just once.

love-disappears-before-blindness.title: Love Disappears Before Blindness
love-disappears-before-blindness.author: Unknown Author
love-disappears-before-blindness.description: Do you know what a truly hopeless life is like? I was born with a visual impairment, and my mother heartlessly abandoned me. When I finally married Chris, the man I had secretly loved for ten years, my mother married me off to a seventy-year-old man instead. Chris said in a wrathful voice, "I will make you pay fot this deception." During our three years of marriage, I profoundly experienced the punishment Chris inflicted on me. He made me endure humiliation and loneliness, forcing me to watch him be intimate with other women. Everyone laughed at me, trampling my dignity underfoot. One day, Chris coldly said to me, "My real wife has returned. Let's get a divorce." At the same time, I discovered I was pregnant… Continuously updating… Dear readers and friends, thank you for reading this novel. I have recently written a new novel titled <Let Me Go, Mr. Howard>, and if you're interested, you're welcome to look it up and give it a read.

when-i-was-your-wife.author: Unknown Author
when-i-was-your-wife.description: Evelyn, a gifted architect trapped in a loveless marriage to cold CEO Nathaniel, uncovers his lingering ties to his ex. When a shocking pregnancy collides with betrayal, she fights to escape his world—until corporate sabotage and buried desires threaten to rewrite their gilded, broken vows.

fall-in-love-with-the-dominant-billionai.title: Fall in Love with the Dominant Billionaire
fall-in-love-with-the-dominant-billionai.author: Unknown Author
fall-in-love-with-the-dominant-billionai.description: The whispers said that out of bitter jealousy, Hadley shoved Eric's beloved down the stairs, robbing the unborn child of life. To avenge, Eric forced Hadley abroad and completely cut her off. Years later, she reemerged, and they felt like strangers When they met again, she was the nightclub's star with men ready to pay fortunes just to glimpse her elusive performance. Unable to contain himself, Eric blocked her path, asking, "Is this truly how you earn a living now? Why not come back to me?" Hadley's lips curved faintly. "If you’re eager to see me, you’d better join the queue, darling."

the-ballerinas-puzzle.title: The Ballerina's Puzzle
the-ballerinas-puzzle.author: Unknown Author
the-ballerinas-puzzle.description: Kenya Anderson is a 23 year old ballerina, who teaches young girls ballet at a small dance school. She always wanted to get a big break as a lead ballerina but never did, because of the slight limp in her right leg. She usually gets to perform as a back up dancer in the ballet shows. But on this particular show, she attracts the attention of U.S Senatorial aspirant, Levi Ruthford. Teetering both their worlds, completely... Unraveling this mysterious, Senatorial aspirant, Levi Ruthford, bit by tiny bit...
